_comment: Static card data ported from docs/cards.md (v0.0.1). Effect LOGIC lives in engine code (effects/statics/strength), not here; numeric tunables live in engine/config.py. base_strength is an int 0-10, or the string 'dynamic' with a 'dynamic_strength' rule name. tag is null for cards printed with '-'.

cards.name: Nile Crocodile
cards.text: This unit's strength is equal to the number of units you control.

cards.name: Queen Ant
cards.text: When placed, gain 2 food for each unit you control.

cards.name: Wild Dogs
cards.text: When placed, immediately play one more unit from your hand.

cards.name: Wasp
cards.text: When placed, you may remove this unit to destroy an adjacent enemy unit.

cards.name: Spotted Hyena
cards.text: May be placed onto an enemy unit of any strength (ignoring the covering rule) if you control at least 4 other units.

cards.name: Lemming
cards.text: When placed, you may also play every other Lemming from your hand.

cards.name: Rat
cards.text: When placed, if you control 3 or more other units, draw 1.

cards.name: Army Ant
cards.text: When placed, if you have already placed another unit this turn, gain 4 food.

cards.name: Piranha
cards.text: When placed onto an enemy unit, draw 1.

cards.name: Honey Badger
cards.text: May be placed onto an enemy unit of equal or lower strength (instead of strictly lower).

cards.name: Vervet Monkey
cards.text: When placed, if you control another Primate, gain 4 food.

cards.name: Baboon
cards.text: When placed, if you control another Primate, draw 1.

cards.name: Raven
cards.text: Costs 12 food to play. When placed, draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Anaconda
cards.text: This unit's strength is equal to the number of units in the discard.

cards.name: Vulture
cards.text: Whenever an enemy unit is removed, draw 1 (once per turn).

cards.name: Matriarch Elephant
cards.text: Immovable.

cards.name: Giant Tortoise
cards.text: Cannot be covered by enemy units.

cards.name: Hippopotamus
cards.text: When an enemy unit is placed on an adjacent crossroad, remove it if its strength is 3 or less.

cards.name: Rhinoceros
cards.text: When placed, remove all enemy units of strength 3 or less adjacent to this unit.

cards.name: Gray Wolf
cards.text: When placed, remove an adjacent enemy of strength 3 or less.

cards.name: Boa Constrictor
cards.text: When placed onto an enemy unit, remove that unit instead of stacking on it.

cards.name: Raccoon
cards.text: When placed, the opponent discards a random card.

cards.name: Cape Buffalo
cards.text: When this unit is removed, draw 1.

cards.name: Owl
cards.text: When placed, look at the top 3 cards of your deck; draw 1 and put the rest on the bottom.

cards.name: Jackal
cards.text: When placed, return a unit from the discard to the top of your deck.

cards.name: Coyote
cards.text: When placed, if you control another Canine, draw 1.

cards.name: Hibernating Bear
cards.text: Immovable. When placed, lose all your stored food; two turns later, gain twice that amount.

cards.name: Octopus
cards.text: When placed, search your deck for a unit and put it into your hand.

cards.name: Egg
cards.text: After 2 turns, remove this unit and draw 2 cards. Fragile.

cards.name: Queen Bee
cards.text: Whenever you gain food, gain 3 additional food.

cards.name: Opossum
cards.text: When placed, draw 1. When this would be removed, return it to your hand instead.

cards.name: Cottontail
cards.text: When placed, draw 1.

cards.name: Squirrel
cards.text: When placed, gain 8 food.

cards.name: Honeybee
cards.text: When placed, gain 8 food; if you control another Insect, gain 4 more.

cards.name: Chipmunk
cards.text: When placed, gain 5 food.

cards.name: Wild Boar
cards.text: When placed, gain 3 food.

cards.name: Hedgehog
cards.text: When this unit is removed, draw 1.

cards.name: Armadillo
cards.text: Cannot be removed until your next turn.

cards.name: Pufferfish
cards.text: When an enemy unit is placed on top of this, remove that enemy unit and this unit.

cards.name: Cheetah Brother
cards.text: When placed, you may immediately play Cheetah Sister from your hand or deck.

cards.name: Cheetah Sister
cards.text: When placed, you may immediately play Cheetah Brother from your hand or deck.

cards.name: Leopard
cards.text: When placed, remove an adjacent enemy of strength 4 or less.

cards.name: Lioness
cards.text: When placed, draw 1 for each Cat you control adjacent to this unit.

cards.name: Tiger
cards.text: When placed, remove an adjacent enemy of strength 5 or less.

cards.name: Snow Leopard
cards.text: While you control this, your other Cats may be placed onto enemy units of equal or lower strength.

cards.name: Lion
cards.text: Vanilla body - the pride anchor; raw strength is the point.

cards.name: Lynx
cards.text: When placed, if you control another Cat, draw 1.

cards.name: Cougar
cards.text: When placed, you may place this adjacent to any Cat you control, ignoring connection.

cards.name: Serval
cards.text: When placed, remove an adjacent enemy of strength 6 or more.

cards.name: Black Panther
cards.text: Cannot be targeted by enemy special effects.

cards.name: Caracal
cards.text: When placed, if you control another Cat, gain 4 food.

cards.name: Domestic Cat
cards.text: When placed, if you control another Cat, you may play one more Cat from your hand.

cards.name: Golden Eagle
cards.text: Flight.

cards.name: Chameleon
cards.text: May be placed on any unit, and any unit may be placed on top of it.

cards.name: Rabbit
cards.text: At the start of your next turn, draw a Rabbit.
